pr.title: Minimal recurrent motif (sb1 rs2 g0.18) – non-record submission

output.summary: Minimal recurrent motif reuses a single shared block with soft gating and sparse recurrence to build a compact effective structure for compression.
output.valOnlyReasoning: False because the submission trains a standard recurrent motif model and only reports validation metrics without any explicit val-only training regime.
techniques: shared recurrent block reused across steps
minimal recurrence steps for structural closure
